get.summary: Get details on the authenticated user

get.description: Returns a paginated list of categories belonging to the specified group. Root categories only by default; pass ?all=1 to include all levels.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Pass 1 to return all categories regardless of depth (not just roots)

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter to categories created after this date

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter to categories created before this date

post.description: Creates a category inside the specified group. The `fields` object accepts dynamic field values keyed by handle.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: ID of the category group the new category will belong to

handle.description: URL-safe identifier (auto-generated from name when omitted)

parent_id.description: ID of the parent category for hierarchical nesting

fields.description: Dynamic field values keyed by handle (e.g. {"colour": "#ff0000", "summary": "The PHP language"})

get.description: Returns a category with its dynamic field values and immediate children.

put.description: Updates a category's core attributes and/or its dynamic field values. Any `fields` keys sent will overwrite the stored value for that handle; omit a key to leave it unchanged.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: ID of the category to update

parent_id.description: ID of the parent category (cannot be a descendant of this category)

fields.description: Dynamic field values keyed by handle

delete.description: Permanently deletes the category. Child categories are not automatically deleted; reassign or delete them first.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: ID of the category to delete

get.description: Returns a paginated list of category groups, each including the total number of categories it contains.

post.description: Creates a category group along with its backing field layout. Optionally attach existing field groups to define custom fields for categories in this group.

field_groups.description: IDs of field groups whose fields should be available on categories in this group

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: ID of the category group to update

field_groups.description: IDs of field groups to sync (replaces existing assignment)

delete.description: Permanently deletes the category group. All categories belonging to this group will also be deleted.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: ID of the category group to delete

get.summary: Get a paginated list of Entries

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Retrieve submissions that were created after a specific date

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Retrieve submissions that were before after a specific date

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: How you want to order results

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction for sorted orders (asc, desc)

get.summary: Get details on a specific Entry

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the entry to retrieve

get.description: Returns a paginated list of status groups, each including the total number of statuses it contains.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: ID of the status group to update

delete.description: Permanently deletes the status group and all of its statuses.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: ID of the status group to delete

get.description: Returns a paginated list of statuses. Filter by status group using the status_group_id query parameter.

parameters.name: status_group_id
parameters.description: Filter results to a specific status group

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter to statuses created after this date

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter to statuses created before this date

post.description: Creates a status within the specified status group. If is_default is true, the previous default in the same group is automatically cleared.

status_group_id.description: ID of the status group this status belongs to

handle.description: URL-safe identifier, unique within the group

is_default.description: Set as the default status for the group (clears any existing default)

is_public.description: Whether this status is publicly visible

put.description: Updates a status. If is_default is set to true, the previous default in the same group is automatically cleared.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: ID of the status to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: ID of the status to delete

get.summary: Get a paginated list of Users

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Retrieve submissions that were created after a specific date

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Retrieve submissions that were before after a specific date

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: How you want to order results

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction for sorted orders (asc, desc)

get.summary: Get details on a specific User

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to retrieve

current_page.description: The number of the page the results arise from

last_page.description: The last page number for results

path.description: The full URL to the given results

per_page.description: How many results each request will contain

Links.title: Collection Links
Links.description: Contains the links used to paginate

first.description: The full URL to the first page of results

last.description: The full URL to the last page of results

prev.description: The full URL to the prev page of results

next.description: The full URL to the next page of results

total_items.description: The total number of items available within the result set

items_per_page.description: How many items are provided per page

id.description: The primary key for the item in question

CategoryGroup.title: Category Group
CategoryGroup.description: A category group that contains categories

categories_count.description: Total number of categories in this group

Category.title: Category
Category.description: A category belonging to a category group. Categories support hierarchical nesting via parent_id and carry optional dynamic field values defined by the group's field layout.

group_id.description: ID of the category group this category belongs to

parent_id.description: ID of the parent category, or null for root categories

handle.description: URL-safe unique identifier within the group

fields.description: Dynamic custom field values keyed by field handle. The available field handles and their value types are defined by the category group's field layout.

children.description: Immediate child categories, included only when the children relation is loaded (i.e. on show requests)

StatusGroup.title: Status Group
StatusGroup.description: A named collection of statuses shared across entries or other models.

statuses_count.description: Total number of statuses in this group

Status.title: Status
Status.description: A status option belonging to a status group.

status_group_id.description: ID of the status group this status belongs to

handle.description: URL-safe identifier, unique within its group

is_default.description: Whether this is the default status in its group

is_public.description: Whether this status is publicly visible

sort_order.description: Display sort position within the group

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Manage categories within a category group. Categories support hierarchical nesting (parent_id) and carry optional dynamic custom fields defined by the group's field layout.

tags.name: Category Groups
tags.description: Manage category groups. A category group is a named container for a set of categories and defines the field layout that all categories in the group share.

tags.name: Status Groups
tags.description: Manage status groups. A status group is a named collection of statuses (e.g. "Publishing Workflow") that can be assigned to entry groups.

tags.name: Statuses
tags.description: Manage individual statuses within a status group. Setting is_default=true on a status will automatically unset the previous default in the same group.
